label: Microsoft Teams
description: Read and send messages, post to channels, and browse teams in Microsoft Teams via the Microsoft Graph API.

form.title: Connect Microsoft Teams
form.subtitle: Authorize Anton to read and send messages in Microsoft Teams using your Azure AD / Entra ID app.

methods.label: Sign in with Microsoft (OAuth 2.0)
methods.description: Register an app in Azure AD / Entra ID, paste the client ID and secret below, then authorize Anton via Microsoft's consent screen. Tokens are stored locally and refreshed automatically.
methods.how_to:
## Register an Azure AD / Entra ID app

You need a Microsoft application registration to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret for Anton.

1. Go to [Azure Portal → Microsoft Entra ID → App registrations](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_RegisteredApps/ApplicationsListBlade) and click **New registration**.
2. Give it a name (e.g. `Anton`), choose **Accounts in this organizational directory only** (or **any tenant** for personal accounts), and click **Register**.
3. On the app overview page, copy the **Application (client) ID** — this is your **Client ID**.
4. Go to **Certificates & secrets → Client secrets → New client secret**. Set an expiry and click **Add**. Copy the **Value** immediately (it's only shown once).
5. Go to **API permissions → Add a permission → Microsoft Graph → Delegated permissions**. Add:
   - `Chat.ReadWrite`
   - `ChannelMessage.Send`
   - `Team.ReadBasic.All`
   - `User.Read`
   - `offline_access`
6. Click **Grant admin consent** if your tenant requires it (recommended).
7. Go to **Authentication → Add a platform → Mobile and desktop applications** and add `http://localhost` as a redirect URI.
8. Paste the **Client ID** and **Client Secret** into the fields below, then click **Submit** to open the Microsoft consent screen.

## Notes

- The client secret expires on the schedule you chose. Rotate it in Entra ID and update the secret in Anton before it expires.
- If your tenant enforces Conditional Access policies, ensure Anton's redirect URI is whitelisted.
- `offline_access` is required so Microsoft issues a refresh token.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Application (Client) ID
fields.description: Found on the app overview page in Azure Portal → Entra ID → App registrations.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: Generated under Certificates & secrets → Client secrets. Shown only once — copy it immediately.

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.label: Tenant ID (optional)
fields.description: Leave blank to use 'common' (supports personal and work accounts). Set to your directory tenant ID to restrict sign-in to your organization only.

methods.label: App-only (Client Credentials / Bot)
methods.description: For unattended server-side access using application permissions. Requires an Azure AD app with admin-consented application-level Graph permissions — no user sign-in involved.
methods.how_to:
## App-only access with client credentials

Use this when Anton needs to act as a service identity (e.g. a bot) rather than on behalf of a specific user. Requires **application permissions** (not delegated) and tenant admin consent.

1. In [Azure Portal → Entra ID → App registrations](https://portal.azure.com/#view/Microsoft_AAD_RegisteredApps/ApplicationsListBlade), open your app (or create a new one).
2. Go to **API permissions → Add a permission → Microsoft Graph → Application permissions**. Add:
   - `Chat.Read.All`
   - `ChannelMessage.Read.All`
   - `Team.ReadBasic.All`
3. Click **Grant admin consent for [your tenant]** — a global admin must approve.
4. Go to **Certificates & secrets → Client secrets → New client secret** and copy the **Value**.
5. Copy the **Application (client) ID** from the app overview.
6. Copy the **Directory (tenant) ID** from the app overview — required for app-only flows (cannot use `common`).
7. Paste all three values into the fields below.

## Notes

- App-only permissions are broader than delegated — use least-privilege and scope only what Anton needs.
- The client secret expires; set a calendar reminder to rotate it before expiry.
- Sending messages as a user is not possible with app-only tokens; Anton will post as the registered app/bot identity.

fields.name: tenant_id
fields.label: Directory (Tenant) ID
fields.description: Found on the app overview page in Azure Portal. Must be your specific tenant ID — 'common' does not work for app-only flows.

fields.name: client_id
fields.label: Application (Client) ID
fields.description: The Application ID of your Entra ID app registration.

fields.name: client_secret
fields.label: Client Secret
fields.description: Generated under Certificates & secrets → Client secrets in the Azure Portal.
